programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Hannibal Buress Freestyles While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: While struggling through the wings of death, Hannibal Buress pulls back the curtain on The Eric Andre Show.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Ty Burrell Fears Sudden Death While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Ty Burrell plays iconic Phil Dunphy on Modern Family. That in no way prepares him for the wings of death.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Charlize Theron Takes a Rorschach Test While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As she struggles through the Scoville onslaught, Charlize Theron teaches Sean some South African slang, breaks down her reality-TV obsession and takes the spiciest Rorschach test in history.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Adam Rippon Competes in the Olympics of Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: With millions of Scovilles coursing through his veins, Rippon shares behind-the-scenes stories from PyeongChang, reveals the magical powers of In-N-Out burgers and judges a very special "Hot Ones" free-skate routine from Sean Evans.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Shawn Mendes Reveals a New Side of Himself While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Find out as the 19-year-old pop phenom reps his Canadian roots while taking on the wings of death. Along the scorched road, Mendes addresses everything from Justin Bieber's hockey skills to guitar store etiquette.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Philip DeFranco Sets a YouTube Record While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As they fend off the Scoville onslaught, Sean and Philip get into the weeds of YouTube history, unpackage the problems with contemporary media and reveal photographic evidence of a bygone era when Sean actually had a six-pack.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Trick Daddy Prays for Help While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Find out as the Miami rap legend takes on the wings of death and discusses everything from partying with Jeremy Shockey to hip-hop's enduring love affair with Benihana.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Tyra Banks Cries for Her Mom While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: In between "America's Next Top Model" anecdotes and expert breakdowns of the modeling industry, Ty Ty drops a fire rap verse, critiques Sean Evans' head shots, stress-eats ice cream, strikes hot sauce-inspired poses and so much more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: John Mayer Has a Sing-Off While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Mayer goes toe to toe with the wings of death, tackling anything and everything along the way: Justin Bieber's melody wizardry, the best guitar faces in history, his obsession with Visvim, the musicality of Dave Chappelle's comedy and much more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Johnny Knoxville Gets Smoked By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The Jackass alum has been gored by bulls and shot in the chest, but can he survive the wings of death?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Marques Brownlee Ranks Hot Sauce Labels While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: During the spice storm, Marques Brownlee breaks down his pro Ultimate Frisbee career, offers sensible headphone advice and provides some scorching breakfast-cereal takes.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Joel Embiid Trusts the Process While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As he tries to swat off the Scovilles, Embiid talks about Meek Mill's return to Philly during the Playoffs, meeting Michael Jordan and why he loves dunking on average Joes on the playground.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Tom Segura Tears Up While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Eventually, Segura ends up with tears streaming from his eyes but is it the hot sauce or the tender words from BFF Bert Kreischer? Find out in this scorching new episode of "Hot Ones."

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Two four-year-old children, Cooper and Millie, take part in Snack Wars: Kids, as the pair of youngsters taste some foods they've never tried before! The little ones tackle olives from Italy, mochi from Japan and Takis from Mexico. Six-year-old twins, Naushi and Neave, try some brand-new snacks from around the world in this fun episode of Snack Wars: Kids! From freaking out over Twiglets, to getting terrified of guacamole, this is an episode of you don't want to miss.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Anya Taylor-Joy and Alexander Skarsgård choose between UK and Swedish vegan snacks in this entertaining episode of Snack Wars! They compare Greggs sausage rolls to Swedish meatballs and fruit gums to a Swedish snack called Djungelvrål. Zac Efron and Ryan Kiera Armstrong compare UK and USA snacks! Zac has a hilarious reaction to Toxic Waste, Ryan tries her first-ever Twinkie, and they both can't get enough of British snacks!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Steve Carell joins us for a hilarious game of Snack Wars: UK v USA, and has a great time comparing snacks from across the pond. He tries Jelly Tots for the first time and finds out what pork scratchings are made from. Sabrina Carpenter reveals she's never eaten a McDonald's, has a hilarious reaction to Whisky and just can't handle the sour taste of Toxic Waste while putting UK and US snacks to the test!

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: Ed reveals the most extreme thing he's done to survive, the most disgusting things he's eaten, and his most dangerous moments walking the Amazon. He also gives great survival tips and tells you why he would never drink Thames water!

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: Below Deck's Captain Sandy Yawn answers your questions on her experiences as a Superyacht captain. The TV personality shares stories of her times travelling through the Bermuda Triangle and what the scariest things you can see in the ocean are.

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: In this episode, we're joined by the legendary Professor Brian Cox to tackle your biggest questions about the universe. From the best evidence for alien life to the possibility of time travel, Brian unpacks some of science's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: In this hilarious episode, Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson and Kevin Hart do amazing impressions of each other, Dwayne reveals a naughty secret about Kevin and we find out their thoughts on The Rock becoming US president!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: In this very funny episode, Jake Gyllenhaal and Gabrielle Union do incredible impressions, Jake reveals his surprising pineapple-on-pizza take, and Gabrielle tries British chocolate for the first time. Oppenheimer stars Emily Blunt and Matt Damon debate whether British food is better than American food and whether you should clap when your plane lands. Matt also reveals why kissing Scarlett Johansson was 'hell'!

programme.title: Jury Room
programme.desc: A criminal barrister, an ex-criminal, a dominatrix, a Gen Z content creator, a personal trainer, and a former SBS soldier tackle one polarising question: Should the UK bring back military conscription in the event of war?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Paul Mescal and Andrew Scott settle some age-old debates about whether bowling is embarrassing, what the best form of potato is, and share their very strong opinions on the immediate banning of karaoke and personalised number plates.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: The ‪Sidemen‬ settle some of the internet's biggest debates! KSI‬ and Simon team up against ‪Ethan and ‪Harry as they debate being more talented than MrBeast, their biggest icks and whether ChrisMD is a better footballer than Simon!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Chris Hemsworth and Anya Taylor-Joy settle the biggest debates on the web, weighing up whether the Australian accent is the sexiest and if they could land a plane in an emergency before enjoying a hilarious debate about time travel.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Austin Butler and Jodie Comer decide whether they'd rather live as a superhero or a wizard, engage in a riveting game of rock, paper, scissors, and delve into the ultimate conundrum: Is a hot dog a sandwich?!

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: SAS soldier 'Big Phil' Campion talks us through the notorious selection process for the SAS, his time serving on the private circuit in Iraq and Afghanistan, and his stint fighting pirates off the coast of Somalia.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Writer Michael Thexton is a survivor of the 1986 Pan Am Flight 73 hijacking which resulted in 22 deaths. In this episode, he walks us through the ordeal of being held hostage by terrorists, seeing his fellow passengers killed, and his narrow escape.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Katy Morgan-Davies opens up about being born into a London cult. Known as the 'Communist Collective' and led by her father, she discusses being locked in the house for 30 years, the power dynamics of the group and the abuse she experienced.

programme.desc: Amy's surprised to learn Finn has returned to town. Jack and Tim win Hudson's Entrepreneur of the Year Award, which leads to unexpected problems for Lou and the arrival of someone from Tim's past.

programme.desc: When flood evacuees come to Hudson, Amy works with a traumatized horse. Jack and Lisa help a young couple. Tim connects with an evacuee. Rick steps up in Lou's absence.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Hudson hosts a lumberjack competition and Amy must retrain a Clydesdale and his owner to compete in the draft horse race. Tim throws his hat in the ring. Lou tries to avoid a date with Fred Garland.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy enters Spartan into an endurance race after realizing he's not ready to retire, Jack is set on gentling an unbroke horse despite the danger, and Lou and Katie reveal hidden feelings while camping.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E17
programme.desc: Darrin sprains his ankle and is confined to bed with his foot in a cast. Wearying of running up and down stairs on errands for Darrin, Samantha suggests he use her power of witchcraft during the emergency. Endora warns Samantha that she is making a mistake. After his initial wishes are granted, Darrin, as Endora had predicted, becomes drunk with power. After showering Samantha with gifts, Darrin not only decides to use his power to get a larger home, but also tells Larry Tate, his boss, that he is retiring so that he and Samantha can take a trip around the world. Samantha's initial plan to stop Darrin by showering him with new luxuries fails. Then Darrin gives Samantha flowers and a wristwatch he has purchased with his own money. From Samantha's happy reaction, Darrin realizes these gifts mean more to her than all the others. Samantha happily agrees to his request that she take back his powers of witchcraft.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E18
programme.desc: After arranging to meet Samantha to celebrate their six month anniversary, Darrin arrives at his office to meet Margaret Marshall, chairman of the board of a cosmetics firm. Margaret, a stunning woman in her late thirties, successful both with men and in business, insists that Darrin fly to Chicago that night to complete the quarter million dollar campaign he had planned for her company. Fumbling out of the anniversary arrangements with Samantha, Darrin flies to Chicago and meets Margaret, who has become quite interested in him, aboard her yacht. There, Darrin sees a cat and feels it may be Samantha, egged on by her mother, Endora, to fly to Chicago to check on his activities. While Darrin evades Margaret's advances, a pelican arrives on the scene. Although both Margaret and Captain Kelly feel there is something strange in Darrin's reactions to the animals, Margaret, realizing Darrin is truly in love with his wife, ac-cepts his advertising campaign. Greeted by Samantha at home, Darrin is reassured that the cat he has brought with him is not his wife. However, when the pelican arrives, Darrin is uncertain whether it might not be Endora.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E19
programme.desc: After Endora promises to curb her witchery for the even-ing, Samantha arranges a dinner for Darrin's parents and her mother to meet. Darrin is fearful of the results. Father Stephens has just retired and feels lost and insecure. Endora, being utterly charming, as she has promised Samantha, plays up to Father. Father once more feels life is worth living, but Mother Stephens becomes jealous. Before Mother is through, she is sure Endora wants to take Father from her. She asks Darrin for the name of a divorce lawyer. Darrin and Samantha work feverishly to save the marriage. Despite their efforts, Mother takes a train to Arizona and Father boards a plane on the first step of a world trip. Samantha asks Endora's help. Using her witchcraft, Endora brings both plane and train to Angel Falls, where Father had proposed to Mother years before. In the romantic setting, both realize they are much younger than they thought.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E20
programme.desc: When Darrin refuses to allow Samantha to act as matron of honor at cousin's wedding in Egypt, Endora tells him he's in trouble. Immediately Darrin starts having problems with his campaign to get the Woolfe Brothers Department Store account. despite Darrin's protests, Larry Tate gives him an assistant. The assistant, young Gideon Whitsett, soon maneuvers himself into being regarded as a brilliant young man. On the make, Gideon soon has Woolfe looking to him for ideas, which he has stolen from Darrin. Darrin is sure that Gideon is a warlock whom Endora has assigned to take his job. When everything else fails, Samantha decides to stop Gideon herself. Using witchcraft, Samantha gets Gideon to reveal the ruthless maneuvers he has been using to get Darrin's job. Darrin, who overhears the conversation, finally realizes Gideon is not a warlock. A right to the jaw puts Gideon out of action. His confidence restored, Darrin sells Mr. Woolfe on his idea for a successful campaign.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E21
programme.desc: Darrin's agency is unable to find a model for the "Jewel of the East" campaign. Darrin hopes they'll be able to do so, if only to bolster the confidence of Wally Ames, who is sub-stituting for the company's top photographer. Samantha trans-forms the Stephens' cat into a beautiful Oriental girl named Ling Ling. Everyone flips over her and the campaign is wrapped up. Darrin invites Larry and Louise Tate and Wally to a victory celebration at his home. Wally, intrigued by Ling Ling's feline grace, brings her along. Samantha's efforts to make Ling Ling give up Wally fail. To avoid a catastrophe, Samantha is forced to tell Darrin and asks him to warn Wally off, but Wally only becomes angry with Darrin. Samantha spikes Ling Ling's drink with truth serum. Wally bows out when Ling Ling displays her true cat nature. Later, Gladys Kravitz calls her husband when she sees Ling Ling clad in a mink coat, lapping milk from a saucer. By the time Abner gets to the window, Samantha has returned Ling Ling to her original state, and Abner gives his wife a spoonful of her nerve medicine.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E22
programme.desc: Endora, hoping to break up her daughter's marriage, superimposes Samantha's face on a print entitled "Maid of Salem:" the print is dated 1690. Darrin buys the print and then begins to worry about the difference between Samantha's age and his own. With Endora planting seeds of doubt at every turn, Darrin visualizes himself as a doddering old man, while Samantha retains her youthful appearance. Everyone, including Larry Tate and the doctor from whom Darrin seeks advice, fails to realize what is troubling him. Then, in a nearby park, Darrin overhears two squirrels to which Endora has given voice talk about their dif-ferences in age. Endora finally admits to Samantha that she can age along with Darrin. Samantha, after telling Darrin she never posed for the picture, tells him that her mother is to blame for their problem. She assures him that they will grow old together, but being in love will never note the difference. As insurance, Samantha uses witchcraft to make the "Maid of Salem" disappear.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E23
programme.desc: The lack of a traffic signal at busy Morning Glory Circle makes it virtually impossible for the Stephens or their neighbors to cross without risking life and limb. Joe Harvey calls a meeting at his home to discuss plans for doing something about it. Darrin makes an ad for a mass rally at the school auditorium to force City Hall to put a traffic light on the corner. However, Samantha has trouble getting Endora to return the traffic signals she has collected. Endora even brings a London bobby to the Stephens' living room. The bobby, of course, has disappeared by the time Gladys Kravitz brings her husband to see him. At the rally, the Mayor tells his constituents a traffic light is unnecessary. However, using her witchcraft, Samantha has the Mayor and his limousine so tied up in a traffic jam that he is convinced a traffic signal is necessary. Endora, as a final touch, brings a modern traffic signal to the Stephens home for the victory celebration. Gladys sees it, but by the time she brings Abner, Samantha makes Endora cause it to vanish.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E24
programme.desc: Samantha tells Endora she doesn't have time for a dress-fitting. Endora solves Samantha's problem by transforming herself into En-Sam, identical to Samantha. Bob Frazer, an author, falls for En-Sam and they do the town together. Meanwhile, Darrin tells Samantha to expect a visit from his friend, Bob Frazer. Gladys Kravitz, who has seen En-Sam with Bob, is sure the Stephens home is about to break up. After Bob sees Samantha and mistakes her for En-Sam, Samantha explains to Endora the trouble she is causing. Endora is convinced when she learns Bob is expected at the Stephens home. All of En-Sam's efforts to break with Bob fail. Bob is determined to have a showdown with Darrin over Samantha. Samantha tells Darrin that Bob has fallen in love with Endora. Endora, still En-Sam, arrives and Bob thinks En-Sam and Samantha are identical twins. Although Endora promises to give Bob Up, Samantha, knowing her mother, is not sure what she will do.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E25
programme.desc: Samantha and Gladys Kravitz become aware of their husbands' interest in Priscilla "Pleasure" O'Riley, a beautiful model, when she buys a house next door. Pleasure is hiding from Thor "Thunderbolt" Swenson, an offensive fullback who has threatened mayhem if he sees her with another man. Darrin becomes involved in Pleasure's affairs after he helps her move in. One night, Pleasure wakes up the Stephens. Telling them that Thunderbolt has learned her new address, she pleads for Darrin's protection. Thunderbolt arrives and Samantha inadvertently gives him the impression that Darrin is Pleasure's new boyfriend. Darrin is saved from Thunderbolt's wrath when Samantha turns him into the image of his grandmother. Then, certain that Abner is the man, Thunderbolt knocks him out and is arrested. Gladys hits the headlines when the newspapers mistakenly single her out as the object of Thunderbolt's jealousy. Pleasure's lawyer gets a court order to keep Thunderbolt away. However, Pleasure accepts Thunderbolt's offer to drive her to the Mayor's office where she is to pose as "Miss Urban Renewal."

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E26
programme.sub-title: Driving Is The Only Way To Fly
programme.desc: After a violent argument while he is teaching her to drive, Darrin enrolls Samantha in a driving school. Basil Koenig assigns his brother-in-law Harold, one of humanity's leading nervous wrecks, to teach Samantha. Time after time, Samantha uses witchcraft to get the dual-controlled car out of catastrophic predicaments. Harold finally breaks when he hears Endora's voice from the back seat and is unable to see her. Harold leaves Samantha, Endora, and the car and heads for a psychiatrist. Feeling responsible, Samantha takes Darrin to the school to keep Harold from losing his job. Matters get more complicated when Darrin tries to explain Endora's unseen presence. Although Koenig has already fired Harold, he rehires him when Samantha threatens to go to another driving school. After Darrin learns Samantha has cured Harold's nervousness by getting him to join a class in basket weaving, Darrin decides to join, too.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E27
programme.sub-title: There's No Witch Like An Old Witch
programme.desc: Age has played havoc with Aunt Clara's witchcraft. Unable to fly great distances any longer, she is forced to give up a trip to Miami with the other witches. Samantha invites her to stay at the Stephens' home while they are away. All of Aunt Clara's efforts to help around the house prove disastrous. To cheer her up, Samantha and Darrin take her along for an evening on the town with the Caldwells. However, when the babysitter does not arrive, Aunt Clara insists on substituting. Aunt Clara's magic tricks delight Jimmy Caldwell, age six, so much that other families clamor for her services. However Agnes Bain complains when she learns that Aunt Clara has told the children she is a witch and they believe her. Aunt Clara receives a court order restraining her from further babysitting until she reports to Judge Virgil Winner for a hearing. Winner is so impressed by Aunt Clara that he asks her to babysit with his son. Aunt Clara's booming business is cut short, however, when the Stephens send her to Florida by train to join her friends.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E28
programme.desc: Inspired by a demonstration of an electric garage door, Samantha opens her garage by twitching her nose. Plagued by Gladys about this, Abner questions Darrin. To cover up, Darrin foregoes new fishing gear and buys a remote control for the garage. When radio signals from passing planes operate the door at random, Samantha asks Darrin to return the device and use the money for fishing gear. Darrin refuses to believe Samantha and she swears never to use magic again. Later, Samantha and Darrin are trapped when a plane signal locks the garage. While Samantha stands by her vow, refusing Darrin's request to open the door, a plane flies overhead. Darrin and Samantha quarrel when he accuses her of using magic again, but when the door flies open, Gladys and Abner see Samantha and Darrin embracing. Although Darrin is finally convinced, he has trouble explaining matters to the Kravitzes. Abner and Gladys buy a remote control, too. While demonstrating it, Gladys plows right through her garage door.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E13
programme.desc: Samantha's friend, Gertrude, a nice, plain-looking girl expresses her envy of the happiness Samantha has found in marriage. Although Darrin tries to avoid getting mixed up in matchmaking, Samantha persuades him to bring Kermit, a handsome artist, home to dinner to meet Gertrude. Kermit falls for Gertrude. Although Samantha will mot admit it, Darrin suspects Gertrude is a witch and tries to break up her romance with Kermit. Darrin arranges a meeting at a nightspot for Kermit with Susan, a former girl friend. There, Samantha uses witchcraft to get Susan into an argument with Kermit. Susan storms out, unable to recall what has happened. When Gertrude arrives, according to Samantha's plan, Kermit proposes to her.

programme.desc: Carrie's investigation into the murder of a talented computer programmer exposes a successful businessman's secret.

programme.title: Unforgettable S4E12
programme.desc: A former informant's murder threatens to expose Al and Russo's conspiracy to plant evidence that sent a corrupt cop to prison years ago.

programme.title: Unforgettable S4E13
programme.desc: A sniper's suicide leads Carrie (Poppy Montgomery) to an incident buried deep in her past that calls her perfect memory into question.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A female NYPD detective possesses the special ability to remember everything -- although a gift in her job, it's also a curse in her personal life.

programme.title: Unforgettable S1E1
programme.desc: To solve the brutal murders of an anesthesiologist and her husband, Carrie (Poppy Montgomery) calls on her own childhood trauma to help her connect with the only witness to the crime, the late couple's seven-year-old son.

programme.title: Unforgettable S4E8
programme.desc: Carrie and Al's investigation into young boy's kidnapping exposes a grudge harbored by a college classmate of the child's dad.

programme.title: Unforgettable S4E9
programme.desc: Carrie and Delina go undercover to unravel the murder of a scientist who was training for a mission to Mars.

programme.title: Unforgettable S4E10
programme.desc: A hurricane forces Carrie and Al to seek refuge in a rundown precinct house and fend off a gang sent to free an elusive drug kingpin.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: Destinies are forever changed by new arrivals.

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: An old friend returns and the French Revolution urges Ross into action.

programme.title: How the Greeks Changed the World
programme.desc: The Ascent of Civilization is a gripping landmark series with a twist – a fresh look at three ancient trailblazer cultures that have shaped all of our lives. Democracy, science, theatre, plumbing, modern roads, laws, the Olympics, conquering the seas, the discovery of America, and the onset of globalisation … you'd be hard-pushed to find a more eclectic list of achievements. They're all at the heart of modern society, but their origins were passed down to us through the ages. It's an inheritance that leads us back to the world of the Ancients – the world of the Greeks, the Romans and the Vikings.

programme.title: The First Victim
programme.desc: Hitler's Poland Campaign unleashed a “Blitzkrieg” lasting six weeks only. However, it was a war of unprecedented brutality resulting in a tremendous suffering of the Polish people in the long run. Jews were herded into Ghettos other residents were imprisoned in camps for forced labor or displaced to make way for German settlers. Hundreds and thousands of them became victims of the Nazi murder machine. In part 2, “World War II” sheds light on some of their lives telling almost forgotten stories.

programme.title: The Silicon Valley Revolution
programme.sub-title: How a few nerds did change the world
programme.desc: The Silicon Valley Revolution - How a few nerds did change the world - From the first Computer Trade Fair to the WWW: The dream of personal computers slowly turns into Big Business. The dream of a few leftist visionaries took over the world in the 1980s: the now legendary Macintosh goes on sale, Bill Gates creates the foundation for his economic imperium, the world wide web connects billions of people all over the world, Google is founded.

programme.title: The Human Limits
programme.desc: The Human Limits - Season 1 - Masters of the Mind: In this part, six talents prove their extraordinary abilities and show how they control their mind. There's Lukas Irmler who's slacklining in dizzying heights above the abyss, Shaolin monk Shi Yan Yao who has spent his whole life practicing meditation and can bend a steel bar with his neck and mathematical super brains Gert Mittring and Rüdiger Gramm who can solve nearly every arithmetic problem without a pocket calculator.

programme.title: Alexander The Great
programme.desc: Alexander The Great - Season 1 - The Path to Power: Part one of this stunning documentary focuses on Alexander the Great's childhood and youth. Born in Macedonia in 356 BC as a member of the Argead dynasty, he succeeded his father Philip II to the throne at the age of twenty. But the kingdom Alexander inherited was volatile.

programme.title: Alexander The Great
programme.desc: Alexander The Great - Season 1 - Until the End of the World: After the assassination of his father, the young king of Macedonia set out to conquer a massive empire. Against overwhelming odds, Alexander led his army to victories across the Persian territories of Asia Minor, Syria and Egypt finally reaching northwest India – all without suffering a single defeat.

programme.title: The Arabs
programme.desc: The Arabs have been bringing knowledge of the ancient world to Europe since the 8th century. In the fields of medicine, mathematics or philosophy, their scholars were far beyond their time and still affect our world today. For a long time the Arabs were estranged, not united by one nation or leader. They had little in common but a shared language.

programme.title: Race: Science, Social Construct, or Both?
programme.desc: The concept of race was invented during colonial and imperialist eras as a means to reify political power structures.

programme.title: Weather Control: The Debate Over Geo-Engineering
programme.desc: In this episode, Athena takes on the controversial topic of Geoengineering, and meets scientists working on an ambitious plan to put a shield around the planet.

programme.title: Human Enhancement
programme.desc: From a cutting-edge, science-based gym & spa, to a medical clinic that offers direct ultrasound brain stimulation designed to increase mental performance.

programme.title: Genetic Editing
programme.desc: The discovery of CRISPR Cas-9 in 2012 opened up seemingly limitless potential in the field of genetic editing.

programme.title: Alternative Energy Sources
programme.desc: In this installment, Athena decodes some of the difficulties faced by the scientists & environmentalists looking to fundamentally change our relationship with energy.

programme.title: Theories Of Everything
programme.desc: Over the centuries, scientific theories have emerged that rival religious cosmology in terms of ambition and scope. But can science ever truly explain everything?

programme.desc: Orangutans Kai, Lingga and Joly embark on a new chapter as they arrive at a wildlife park in Spain. Monkey World animal manager, Jeremy, accompanies them to ensure their well-being during the journey and help them adjust to their fresh surroundings.

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: The Royal Bengal Tiger is in it's most primeval form here in the Sunderbans. `The tangled mangroves along the tributaries of the river Ganga are one of the most fearsome forests of the World. The tigers could kill humans and eat them.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Hunting has been a long-standing cultural tradition in the North Eastern India for long. But with the shirking of the forests and endangering of the wildlife, hunting has become unsustainable. But it is not that this has stopped hunting.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: What seems calm and tranquil may not necessarily be so. Under the tranquility there maybe a vibrant dynamic world and above water there maybe dangers which are lurking at very corner.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Snow Leopard is the one of the most elusive big cats in the world. This episode details how the wildlife guards and the wildlife department has set up conservation and scientific plans to protect and indeed to enumerate and increase it's population

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Rhino horn is very expensive in the illegal market and the poachers know it. Kaziranga has the only concentrated population of the one horned Rhino in the world. And poachers are attracted to Kaziranga like ants are to sugar.

programme.title: If There Was No Land On Earth
programme.desc: The first episode tells about the fascinating annual migration of the Humpback whales to the warm and tranquil waters of Tonga's Vava'u archipelago, where they mate, give birth, and nurture their young. The majesty and intelligence of these magnificent creatures is truly breathtaking. From the playful antics of newborn calves through the haunting songs of adult males to the human impact on their habitats and lives – an inspiring journey.

programme.title: If There Was No Land On Earth
programme.desc: The second episode takes you on an underwater adventure to the remote and beautiful islands of Fiji, where people face the formidable predators of the ocean. Through stunning underwater world teeming with life and intimate interviews with passionate shark feeders we will capture the raw power and beauty of these incredible creatures. We will also shed light on the importance of shark conservation and the urgent need to protect these apex predators from human threats.

programme.title: If There Was No Land On Earth
programme.desc: The third episode is a story about the rich cultural heritage and remarkable skill of the shipbuilders of Sulawesi told by an amazing local craftsman. We will watch as they construct and sail traditional wooden vessels that have been passed down through generations. We will follow the gripping story of the Carnatic, a British ship that wrecked on the coral reef in 1869, discover how the crew survived and how the treasure they carried was salvaged.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Elephant human conflict has been going on in India for decades. Only now it has increased because of the shrinking forests and the expanding human habitation. North Bengal with it's fragmented habitat of tea gardens, human habitation and paddy fields is a hot bed of conflict

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: The Royal Bengal Tiger is in it's most primeval form here in the Sunderbans. `The tangled mangroves along the tributaries of the river Ganga are one of the most fearsome forests of the World. The tigers could kill humans and eat them.

programme.title: mareTV: The Blue and White Island World of Greece: Mykonos, Naxos and Tinos
programme.desc: Around the once sacred Isle of Delos, some 200 islands, including 20 larger ones, are arranged almost in a circle. This is where the name of the Greek island paradise comes from: Cyclades, a derivation of the Greek word kýklos, circle. Each cyclade has a unique character. The pelican Petros, about 20 years old, is the mascot of Mykonos. He moves from taverna to taverna all day long, scrounging fish. This works out sometimes well and sometimes not so well. Petros does have a few human friends who regularly slip him something, but all too often visitors eager to take pictures block his path. Then he has to "wiggle" his way through the crowd. Jackie Onassis is said to have once brought Petros' "great-grandmother" from Louisiana to the island.

programme.title: The Turkish Riviera
programme.sub-title: The flair of antiquity and a turquoise sea
programme.desc: With a coastline boasting miles of bathing beaches, turquoise waters, breath-taking cliffs whilst being steeped in history, the Turkish riviera was even a fa-vourite of the Ancient Greeks, Romans and Ottomans, who all loved the mild climate and the lush landscape. Near the ruins of the ancient city of Side, Menderes Akdemir works on the latest attraction aimed at Riviera holidaymakers: his spooky pirate ship "Big Kral" is due to leave dry dock and head for the sea. Mehmet Özata came up with a very clever idea: to be able to cope with the basically ruinous puffer fish plague along the coastline, he produces a selection of leather utensils made of their skin. The islands that surround the sunk-en city of Simena are hugely popular, despite the very modest infrastructure and lack of shopping facilities. This is why Fatma and Ahmet Mazili have transformed their small rowing boat into a floating snack bar. An-other gap in the market was brought to life by Ufuk Secgin. He came up with the idea of providing Halal Holidays, vacations that conform to Islam. For Muslims to be able to relax on holiday, much has to be well organised, with a copy of the Koran and a prayer rug seen as the absolute minimum requirements

programme.title: Montenegro
programme.sub-title: From the Black Mountains to the Beach
programme.desc: The Balkan land of Montenegro owes its name to the Black Mountains. But there is so much more: steep cliffs, deep gorges, picturesque lakes, orthodox monasteries, Venetian architecture, sandy beaches and even fjords like those of Norway. There are three climate zones alone in the Adriatic. The inhabitants still try to find their way between the challenges of a post-socialist system, the much-vaunted Balkan remoteness and the opportunities of a still almost completely undiscovered tourist destination in Europe.

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: The Sulcis Archipelago is located off the south-western coast of Sardinia and is part of the province of of southern Sardinia. The islands of San Pietro, Sant'Antioco and Isola Piana form the archipelago, together with several uninhabited islets and rocks form the archipelago. It belongs to the less known areas in Italy and is little developed for tourism. Nevertheless stars like Tom Cruise and Roberto Cavalli come here to enjoy the peace, seclusion and good food. The islanders are only moderately interested in these visitors, and their down-to-earth attitude has never lost.

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: Lake Iseo is located on the southern foothills of the Alps. It extends over the provinces of Brescia and Bergamo in the northern mainland of Italy. In the middle of Lake Iseo lies the largest island of the southern European inland waters. Monte Isola, as the island is called after its central mountain lies close to its two neighboring islands, Isola di San Paolo and Isola di Loreto. As early as the 11th century, a monastic association of Benedictines settled here. For many Italians, Lake Iseo is the most beautiful spot in their homeland. It is all the more astonishing how little the influence of tourism is here. Driving is strictly forbidden on the three islands, and only on Monte Isola. Only on Monte Isola there is a regular bus service in the summertime. Thus, the three islands are an oasis of an oasis of tranquility most of the year. The historical buildings and the nature remind of the long tradition in which the Italians have cultivated this retreat. Only every five years in the autumn a big celebration takes place. Then over 200,000 paper flowers decorate the island. The flowers are reminiscent of the time in the Middle Ages when a Roma woman brought her son to the island to be cured from the from the rampant plague. In gratitude, she donated a sea of flowers. The Festa di Santa Croce has been one of the main attractions in northern Italy ever since. The days are radiant with color, it is the only time when it gets crowded in the small streets of the island villages. The next festival was celebrated in September 2021.

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: The Tuscan Archipelago is a group of islands at the height of Florence. The archipelago stretches from the Ligurian Sea to the Tyrrhenian Sea, north-east of Corsica. The archipelago consists of seven main islands - Giglio, Elba, Gianutri, Capraia, Pianisoa, Gorgona and Montecristo - and other smaller islands and rocks. Not all of them are inhabited. We look at the three most extraordinary islands of the archipelago: Elba, Capraia and the island of Montecristo. The Tuscan Archipelago is one of the most important natural wonders of the world and is protected as Parco Nazionale dell'Arcipelago Toscano. With its 61.474 hectares of protected and 17,694 hectares of protected land area, it is the largest marine protected area in in Europe. Capraia is the third largest island of the archipelago and is located with its small harbor in the channel in front of Corsica. The island is an autonomous municipality with about 300 inhabitants. It is also considered the most maritime island of the archipelago. At the end of the eighties, the penal colony on Capraia was closed was closed and the island opened to tourism.

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: Far from the glamour and spotlight of Lampedusa, Pantelleria is one of the best kept secrets among the Italian islands. Located closer to Tunisia than to the Italian mainland, Pantelleria closer to Tunisia than to the Italian mainland, Pantelleria has been nicknamed "The Last Island," a title also given by Giosuè Calaciura gave to his 2016 historical novel set on Pantelleria. Pantelleria, that is the island of lava, capers and of the liqueur wine that comes here Zibibbo. An island with an ancient history, where for centuries farmers and fishermen have pursued their craft. their craft. The famous Zibibbo grapes are cultivated here - among other things also on the vineyard that Gerard Depardieu and his wife Carole Bouquet bought to produce traditional liqueur and nutmeg wine themselves and distribute it worldwide. The cuisine of the island is as much Arabic as Italian, couscous with fish is a typical island dish.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love

From embracing the snowy outdoors to enjoying the local businesses of a tight knit community, join Samantha as she explores what makes Big Sky a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love

It's easy to see why Florida's Paradise Coast is a place to love.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: it's been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let's see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It's an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There's only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there's going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkey's south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, we'll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It's all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This year's event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. programme.title: NCT DREAM 'CHILLER' MV
programme.desc: Both double title tracks, 'CHILLER' and 'BTTF,' were written by hitmaker KENZIE, creating a seamless narrative connection. NCT DREAM's title track 'CHILLER' stands out with its experimental sound rooted in French touch, with standout electronic textures and unpredictable progressions. The lyrics playfully depict the cool and confident 'CHILLER' enjoying their brightest moments, signaling the start of a new chapter for NCT DREAM. Notably, 'CHILLER' serves as both a prequel and sequel to 'BTTF,' offering a deeper experience when listened to together.

programme.title: HYO 'YES' MV
programme.desc: 'YES' is a Sped-Up House track driven by a two-step rhythm and rhythmic bassline. The sophisticated and energetic production is elevated by a bold, captivating topline that enhances the overall vibe of the song. Hyoyeon (HYO) brings refreshing, upbeat energy to beat the summer heat with her new single 'YES.'

programme.title: WayV 威神V 'BIG BANDS (狂想曲)' MV
programme.desc: WayV's title track “BIG BANDS” is an upbeat dance song packed with lively brass, rhythmic beats, and jazzy elements. Its powerful groove and catchy chant vocals leave a strong impression. With lyrics about creating a massive energy that moves the soul, the song captures WayV's confidence and bold vibe. The music video shows the members embracing their unique characters as they “redesign” and transform the world, brought to life with eye-catching visual effects and dynamic performances.

programme.title: NCT DREAM Refreshing Tracks Playlist
programme.desc: Feel the breeze of youth — NCT DREAM's refreshing playlist for bright upbeat days.

programme.title: TVXQ! Best Performance MV Collection
programme.desc: Witness the powerful elegance and timeless stage presence of TVXQ! through their most unforgettable performance MVs.

programme.title: aespa 'Dirty Work' MV
programme.desc: “Dirty Work” is a dance track with catchy synth bass and cool vocal melodies, showing off a more Chill and Cool side of their sound. In the music video, the members turn into bold resistance fighters who take on any kind of “dirty work” for each other, highlighting their strong sense of unity. The performance blends fierce, powerful moves with a hint of sensual flair, creating a stage that's full of contrast and energy.

programme.title: KEY 'HUNTER' MV
programme.desc: SHINee's KEY's title track “HUNTER” is a dance song combining grand bass, heavy kicks, rhythmic guitar riffs, and rich synth pads. Its lyrics capture the “ecstasy in pain” of obsession within a complex relationship, heightened by KEY's dynamic vocals. KENZIE, who has worked on KEY's signature songs, took part in the writing and composing, showcasing their trusted synergy. The performance features refined choreography that highlights KEY's delicate expressiveness and intense energy, delivering a conceptual stage that captivates from start to finish.

programme.title: NCT WISH 'SURF' MV
programme.desc: NCT WISH's latest track 'SURF' is a hybrid dance-pop summer song featured on their 3rd mini album 'COLOR', marking their first summer release since debut. Built on funky, heavy rhythms layered with refreshing sounds, lyrical melodies, and clear, transparent vocals, it delivers a cool burst of energy. The lyrics liken the thrill and freedom of youth to surfing, capturing the excitement of riding the waves. Filmed entirely on location in Bali, the music video showcases the group's refreshing charm against a backdrop of lush nature. Through the lighthearted story of a surfing club's training camp, 'SURF' amplifies the vibrant summer vibes even further.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: Draculaura, Frankie, Clawdeen, Cleo and Lagoona travel to a Transylvanian castle to find a lost vampire Princess and bring her back to Monster High. The Ghoul Squad is born.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: The Ghoul Squad searches a tropical island for a fabled water monster - Gil. But before traveling back to Monster High, an island volcano begins to erupt.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: In an effort to save Gil's island, the ghouls travel to an icy mountain range to find a ghoul with ice powers that can stop the imminent volcanic eruption.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: Gob runs away from Monster High. The Ghoul Squad discovers him running wild in a department store for humans. The ghouls have to work together to get him back to Monster High before the store reopens.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: Toralei complicates the Ghoul Squad's latest mission to find a hidden monster deep inside some ancient catacombs.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: The Ghoul Squad travels to Paris to recruit a gargoyle to help with their leaky roof. Rochelle can't leave until the ghouls help her deal with Rockspierre, a troublesome, roof-destroying gargoyle.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: A hiccup with the Monster Mapalogue causes fuzzy little monsters from a popular new game to come to life in Monster High!

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: When the Ghoul Squad tracks down Catty Noir in an old abandoned theatre, they discover she has lost her confidence to go back on stage.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: In an effort to go on a beach vacation, Toralei steals the Monster Mapalogue, but breaks it - teleporting herself, Cleo, and Lagoona to a faraway desert location. Or so they think.

programme.title: Monster High: Adventures of the Ghoul Squad
programme.desc: The Ghoul Squad receives a call for help from Treesa Thrornwillow, whose sister is plotting to destroy the Haunted Garden where they both live.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: The Knights Code
programme.desc: Jestro uses the Book of Chaos to unleash, um, chaos and attack the King's hover train to try and kidnap the royal party. Can the NEXO-Knights bring order out of the chaos and save the King? Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him he tells Jestro he's not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn't listen. Now the Book unleashes chaotic monsters and Jestro uses them to attack the King and his party who are on a business-related tour of the kingdom. When the NEXO-Knights show up to stop the monster attacks and realize that they must save King and Queen Halbert – Macy's parents – from the chaotic evil monsters that have been unleashed. Clay asserts himself as leader and brings order to the knights from the chaos. He has his own book: the Book of the Knight's Code. They should all live by it.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: Return of the Optimus Prime, Part 1
programme.desc: Scientists infects Autobots and Decepticons with a plague that will pit them against their own kind.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: Return of the Optimus Prime, Part 2
programme.desc: The hate plague rapidly spreads among robots and humans on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons attack Autobot City to gain control of a key to the Cybertron plasma chamber.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A genius uses Bumblebee's fluid, turning into Meltdown with a deadly, corrosive touch.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Professor Sumdac's upgraded animatronic dinosaurs turn rogue, becoming rampaging Dinobots.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Autobots face a havoc-wreaking muscle car as Ratchet recalls the Great Autobot Wars.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee races to stop Nanosec, a super-speed crook on a mission to destroy Detroit.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A new transformer enters the solar system.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With Optimus damaged and temporarily out of commission, the newly-arrived Jetfire takes command.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: On the moon, Thrust continues his plotting with Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots search for signs of each other, but start to lose hope.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Ultimate Autobot Hunter is unleashed on our heroes.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Led by a new member, Team Prime launches a desperate assault on the Decepticon citadel.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots adjust to new group dynamics within their expanded lineup.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An accident causes the Dinobot Grimlock to become a super genius.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Petrified Smurfs: Brainy Smurf's done it again. This time, in front of Papa Smurf, too. He has recited a spell that changes everything to stone. Everything including himself and all the Smurfs and the Village, and the forest around for miles... Fortunately, Peewit appears....

programme.title: The Bignose Dilemma
programme.desc: Vanity dislikes having the same blue nose as any other Smurf. What he needs is something special... Bignose, Bigmouth's fiancée, also wants to change her nose. And so, by the way, does Gargamel. Some nose exchanging takes place...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Denisa's Greedy Doll: Gargamel's niece Denisa leaves her doll at his house, so he uses it to cast a controlling spell on Greedy. Gargamel nearly traps the Smurfs, until Papa turns the tables on him and returns the doll to Denisa

programme.title: Don Smurfo's Uninvited Guests
programme.desc: Thanks to Brainy, he, Nanny, and Snappy end up in a Don Smurfo storybook. If they don't get out by the last page, they'll be trapped in there forever. While Painter paints them out of danger, Papa races to prepare the potion in time.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Clumsy In Command: Nobody wants to go when Clumsy leads a hike to Mount Majestic, so Papa suggests a two-team race to the summit. Brainy's team is sure they'll win, but Clumsy proves that persistence and caring are just as important as brains when he rescues Brainy's team from a falling boulder and wins the race.

programme.title: Denisa's Slumber Party
programme.desc: Sassette goes to a slumber party at Denisa's. Denisa ignores her when three big girls come too. But Denisa learns the true meaning of friendship when the bigger girls steal all her toys and Sassette helps her out.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Loss Of Smurfs: When the emergency call rings, all the Smurfs in the Village drop what they are doing and run to hear the news. But when Vanity Smurf calls for an assembly so that the Smurfs can admire his new hat, it is too much. They send him on his way out of the village, and Vanity has the bad luck of meeting Lofty, the Elf, who suggests a horrible mud bath...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Prince And The Hopper: What is that strange talking frog that Morlock the Wizard sends all of Prince Theodore's soldiers to catch? Is it a demon frog, as he says, or something else? Truth will out when Smurfette and the Smurflings meet the frog. They help to change this frog back into Prince Theodore himself, for he's been the victim of a spell cast by Morlock.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lost Smurf: Every 500 years, Castle Captor appears and abducts innocent travelers. Grandpa takes off in his balloon for the castle, where he meets Nanny Smurf, who's been missing for 500 years. They have only a short time to escape, or they'll become permanent guests!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Land Of The Lost And Found: Hefty, Handy, and Brainy lose Papa's telescope and Scour, the Lord of Lost and Found, finds it. The Smurfs say they'll trade anything to get it back, so Scour takes their most valuable possessions – handiness, heftiness and braininess. They journey to his domain to retrieve what was lost.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Archives Of Evil: The evil warlock Nemesis shows up at the Wizards' Library to steal the knowledge from the Archives of Evil and so get the Long Life Stone. But it's Brainy who inadvertently saves the day when he switches Greedy's cookbook and Papa's spell book.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A House For Nanny: Roommates Smurfette and Nanny are getting on each other's nerves, so the time has come for Nanny to have a house of her own. As Nanny and Smurfette trek off to find a house-warming plant, the others design the Smurfliest house for her.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Tear Of A Smurf: A beautiful princess is turned into a hag and needs the whiskers of a cat and the tear of a Smurf for her magic potion. Azrael, Grouchy and Jokey unwittingly cooperate and as the magical transformation takes place, the princess frees them and they happily hurry home.

programme.title: How To Smurf A Rainbow
programme.desc: Mother Nature is too busy to conjure a rainbow for the Smurfs' festival, so Papa Smurf borrows her cookbook and mixes up the recipe himself. As there is no yellow available, they use the leprechaun's gold to produce a beautiful rainbow before Gargamel can steal it.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Chip Off The Old Smurf: Disaster strikes when Brainy and Baby mix up Papa Smurf's formulas, leaving them powerless before an army of hungry locusts unleashed on the forest by Gargamel.

programme.title: Lumbering Smurfs
programme.desc: Greedy tree cutters plan to chop down King Gerard's forest while he is away on vacation. Papa Smurf disguises the Smurfs as ghosts to scare the lumberjacks who willingly surrender to the returning King and his array.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Hovel Is Not A Home: In his search for a grander hovel, Gargamel looks in the Great Book of Spells to conjure up a new home. But all of his spells backfire and that convinces him that there's no place like home!

programme.title: Speak For Yourself, Farmer Smurf
programme.desc: Farmer hides his love for Smurfette by assuming a disguise and sending her poems. When they finally meet, they are captured by Bigmouth and in their struggle to get free, they discover their mutual friendship.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hefty's Heart: Gargamel infects Hefty's heart with hate and then uses the little Smurf as a decoy for the others. Fortunately, Hefty's love overcomes his hate and he helps his little friends escape from Gargamel's clutches.

programme.title: To Smurf A Thief
programme.desc: The Smurfs and Homnibus befriend an unfortunate boy who is forced to steal for his master. Soon, the evil thief is turned over to the magistrate and the boy is happy to live with Homnibus.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Forget-Me-Smurfs: Little Sickly turns into a hero when he forgets his ailments and saves the rest of the Smurfs from the deadly forget-me flowers.

programme.title: The Rabbids are misunderstood artists.
programme.desc: By accident, the rabbids destroy the teleporta-TV.

programme.title: The Rabbids are having a party.
programme.desc: A rabbid discovers the immense power of music when he puts on some headphones.

programme.title: The Rabbids rebel.
programme.desc: Thanks to the Teleporta-TV, the rabbids lay hands on a voodoo doll with strange powers…

programme.title: The Rabbids are too cold.
programme.desc: An old lady distracts a Rabbid, and he accidentally shuts himself inside a supermarket freezer.

programme.title: Rabbids are in the wild.
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid gives a Rabbid butler a old pictures of himself, frozen inside an ice cube.

programme.title: Mad Rabbid is unstoppable
programme.desc: Mad Rabbid and his assistant are on a mission to collect a uranium rod in a warehouse.

programme.title: The Rabbids turn the city upside down.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get their hands on a remote-controlled car, and figure out how to use the controller.

programme.title: The Rabbids take off.
programme.desc: The rabbids unintentionally help Zak and his childhood crush Zoey develop a romance…

programme.title: The Rabbids in Santa's country.
programme.desc: When Gina & John get out of power in their polar station, they create a new way to produce electricity.

programme.title: Rabbids at your service!

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic joins up with a group of Dr. Robotnik's rejects who have been banished to the dump and helps them understand that their shortcomings were really their strenghs.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic leaves Tails in charge of protecting a squirrel village food supply, when he zips off to stop a dam from breaking. Robotnik sends Scratch and Grounder after Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik installs a new "obedience microchip" in Scratch and Grounder and orders them to drill for a rare mineral in a tropical mountain. With his Freezomatic machine, Robotnik covers the mountain in ice and runs a Hermit out of his home.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.desc: Mr. Bean's electricity is cut off so he decides to build a wind turbine.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to buy a cupcake, but his wallet is empty, so he has to visit a cash dispenser.

programme.desc: When one of the toy cars of his racing track set becomes broken, Mr. Bean decides to buy a new one.
